BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because reflected xss via javascript context.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: Victim must visit a crafted URL or interact with page.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Compromise of client-side data (e.g., cookies, sessions)

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Sensitive information like cookies/session tokens at risksible.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Data or logic may be modified.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is well known and demonstrable.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Victim must visit a crafted URL or interact with page

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Compromise of client-side data (e.g., cookies, sessions)

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Loss of session/cookie data is critical
